title: Pippin
perf: Saturday, January 24, 2026 — matinee, with a cast talkback
perf_note: Talkback with the cast is pending confirmation.
blurb: See SUU's production up close, then unpack how the company stages this metatheatrical favorite — the storytelling tricks, the showmanship, and the choices that pull an audience inside the tale.

title: Hadestown
blurb: Study how this modern myth turns folk and jazz into a living world, then watch the touring production carry the same story to its feet on the Eccles stage.

title: Come From Away
blurb: Explore how a true story becomes an ensemble musical — many roles, one stage — then see Pioneer Theatre Company bring the people of Gander to life.

title: Back to the Future
blurb: Experience the touring production live, then dig into how a beloved film makes the leap from screen to script to stage in an Encore workshop built around the show.

title: Les Misérables
perf_note: This is the evening Encore's own Kassie performs as Little Cosette.
blurb: Look at how an epic novel becomes a sung-through score, then watch it open up under the desert sky at Tuacahn — with a familiar face on stage.

title: Shakespearience
workshop: August 7, 2026 — workshop hosted by the Festival
perf_note: Shows: She Loves Me and Hamlet. Festival workshop: “Connections and Conflicts: A She Loves Me.”
blurb: A full day at the Utah Shakespeare Festival — a Festival-led workshop paired with live performances of She Loves Me and Hamlet, comedy and tragedy side by side.

title: Our Town
blurb: Consider how Wilder tells a whole life with almost no scenery, then watch the Hale's staging make the ordinary feel extraordinary.

title: The Phantom of the Opera
blurb: Trace how spectacle and score build one of theater's most famous worlds, then see it staged in full at The Smith Center.

title: Anastasia
perf_note: Dates are pending Encore's A Christmas Carol schedule.
blurb: Follow how history and legend braid into a single story, then catch the Hale's production once dates are set.

title: The Outsiders
blurb: Examine how a coming-of-age classic moves from page to a brand-new stage musical, then see it at The Smith Center to open 2027.
